flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana University-Kokomo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Indiana University-Kokomo rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (26.3% → 31.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Indiana University-Kokomo rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (59.5% → 69.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Indiana University-Kokomo fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.6k → $17.0k).
